author: doll-agent
content: Replace flatten-then-reshape in IntoNumPy<Ix2>::into_pyarray and IntoNumPy<IxDyn>::into_pyarray with direct PyArray2::from_owned_array / PyArrayDyn::from_owned_array. ferray's into_ndarray() is a move (no copy) and the underlying ndarray::Array preserves contiguity, so PyO3's numpy crate sees the source layout and produces correctly-flagged output without a manual F/C branch. -32 lines. Drops PyArrayMethods/NPY_ORDER imports from the lib (kept PyArrayMethods inside the test module since tests still call .readonly()).
